# Golden file: remote.rsync pack
format: v1
---
# D1: rsync delete
command: rsync --delete -a src/ dst/
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: remote.rsync
rule: rsync-delete
---
# D2: rsync remove source files
command: rsync --remove-source-files -a src/ dst/
decision: Deny
severity: High
confidence: High
pack: remote.rsync
rule: rsync-delete
---
# Safe: rsync copy
command: rsync -a src/ dst/
decision: Allow
